fine_grained_training_targets.why_this_priority: This target is selected because repeated detector rows map to Verb form and verb-pattern control (SUBJECT_VERB_AGREEMENT).
fine_grained_training_targets.practice_focus: Rewrite each damaged clause with subject + correct verb form + complement.
practice_sequence: Identify the main verb in each flagged clause.
Check: is this a base form, gerund, past participle, or infinitive context?
Rewrite the clause with the correct verb form.
For SVA errors: isolate subject, check singular/plural, match verb ending.
Practise 5 original sentences with the same verb pattern.

fine_grained_training_targets.why_this_priority: This target is selected because repeated detector rows map to Quantity and comparison expressions (COLLOCATION, NOUN_NUMBER_COUNTABILITY).
fine_grained_training_targets.practice_focus: Practise: number of + countable nouns, amount of + uncountable nouns, fewer/less, more/greater.
practice_sequence: List all quantity expressions from the essay that were flagged.
Classify the noun as countable or uncountable.
Replace incorrect quantity word: number of (C) / amount of (U) / fewer (C) / less (U).
Practise comparative forms: more + adj/noun, adjective + -er, fewer/less.
Write 5 sentences using correct quantity expressions from the essay topic.

fine_grained_training_targets.why_this_priority: This target is selected because repeated detector rows map to Abstract noun + verb/noun collocations (COLLOCATION).
fine_grained_training_targets.practice_focus: Replace translated phrases with natural academic combinations: contribute to society, preserve culture, create opportunities.
practice_sequence: Identify each abstract noun phrase that was flagged.
Find the correct verb collocate: have an impact, make a contribution, create opportunities.
Replace L1-transfer phrases with natural academic phrasing.

Write a paragraph using 3 corrected abstract noun collocations.

fine_grained_training_targets.why_this_priority: This target is selected because repeated detector rows map to Article + noun-number control (NOUN_NUMBER_COUNTABILITY).

fine_grained_training_targets.why_this_priority: This target is selected because repeated detector rows map to Spelling and word-form accuracy (SPELLING).
fine_grained_training_targets.practice_focus: Create a personal correction list and rewrite each misspelled or misformed word in 3 correct sentences.
practice_sequence: Create a two-column error log: wrong form → correct form.
Look up the correct spelling in a dictionary and note the word class.
Write the correct form in 3 different sentences.
Add high-frequency topic words to a personal spelling list.
Proofread the original essay systematically from last sentence to first.
